title: P2 Phase 1A — RAG 最小可用系統
description: 從零建立 quidproquo RAG chat 系統：依賴安裝 → D1 migration → embed pipeline → auth → LangGraph graph → Chat API → Chat UI → Build 驗證

stories.title: 安裝依賴 + 環境設定
acceptanceCriteria: @langchain/langgraph、@langchain/anthropic、langfuse、react、react-dom、@astrojs/react、vitest 出現在 package.json
vitest.config.ts 存在，test.environment='node'，include=['src/**/*.test.ts']
package.json scripts 有 'test' 和 'test:watch'
astro.config.mjs 加入 react() integration
wrangler.jsonc 有 RATE KV binding 和 VECTORIZE_CACHE vectorize binding
pnpm astro check 無 TS 錯誤
stories.evidence: All deps in package.json. vitest.config.ts created with cloudflare:workers alias. test/test:watch scripts present. react() added to astro.config.mjs. RATE KV (83f09dbb) + VECTORIZE_CACHE added to wrangler.jsonc. astro check exit 0.

stories.title: D1 Migration — RAG 資料表
acceptanceCriteria: migrations/0002_rag_phase1.sql 存在，ALTER TABLE post_chunks/doc_chunks 加 image_description、sentence_window
0002 包含 CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE chunks_fts USING fts5
0002 包含 CREATE TABLE chat_logs、feedback、settings
wrangler d1 execute --local --file=migrations/0002_rag_phase1.sql 成功執行
wrangler d1 execute --local 查詢 sqlite_master 能看到 chunks_fts、chat_logs、feedback、settings
stories.evidence: 0002_rag_phase1.sql created. Migration ran successfully locally. Tables verified: chunks_fts, chat_logs, feedback, settings all present in sqlite_master.

stories.title: Chunk ID + Contextual Retrieval（TDD）
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/embed/chunk-id.ts 存在，generateChunkId 回傳 16-char hex，穩定且唯一
src/lib/embed/chunk-id.test.ts 存在，4 個 tests 全過
src/lib/embed/contextual.ts 存在，buildContextualChunk 正確 prepend context
src/lib/embed/contextual.test.ts 存在，3 個 tests 全過
pnpm test 全部通過
stories.evidence: chunk-id.ts and contextual.ts created. 7 tests pass (4 chunk-id + 3 contextual). pnpm test: 24 passed.

stories.title: Embedding Pipeline
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/embed/pipeline.ts 存在，export runEmbedPipeline、embedPosts、embedDocs
pipeline 使用 @cf/baai/bge-large-en-v1.5，batch upsert 100 筆
src/pages/api/embed/sync.ts 存在，POST endpoint，需 verifySession 驗證，回傳 JSON 結果
stories.evidence: pipeline.ts exports runEmbedPipeline/embedPosts/embedDocs with 100-batch upsert. sync.ts POST endpoint with verifySession guard.

stories.title: Auth — Session + Rate Limit（TDD）
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/auth/session.ts 存在，export generateToken、hashToken、createSession、verifySession、deleteSession
src/lib/auth/session.test.ts 存在，4 個 tests 全過
src/lib/auth/rate-limit.ts 存在，export checkAndIncrementRateLimit（接受可選 kv 參數）
src/lib/auth/rate-limit.test.ts 存在，3 個 tests 全過
pnpm test 全部通過
stories.evidence: session.ts + rate-limit.ts created. 7 auth tests pass. pnpm test: 24 passed.

stories.title: Login Page
acceptanceCriteria: src/pages/api/auth/login.ts 存在，POST handler，密碼正確 Set-Cookie session，redirect /chat
src/pages/api/auth/logout.ts 存在，POST handler，刪除 session，redirect /login
src/pages/login.astro 存在，form[method=POST][action=/api/auth/login]，input[type=password]
login.astro 驗證有效 session 後 redirect /chat
pnpm astro check 無 TS 錯誤
stories.evidence: login.ts/logout.ts API endpoints + login.astro page created. Astro check exit 0.

stories.title: Langfuse Helper
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/langfuse.ts 存在，export createTrace、createSpan、updateTrace、scoreTrace
所有函式 non-blocking（.catch() 忽略錯誤），LANGFUSE keys 未設定時靜默 skip
pnpm astro check 無型別錯誤
stories.evidence: langfuse.ts created with all 4 exports. All functions use .catch(()=>{}). Empty publicKey check silently returns. Astro check exit 0.

stories.title: LangGraph State Definition
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/rag/state.ts 存在，export StateAnnotation 和 GraphState type
StateAnnotation 包含 messages（append reducer）、plan、search_results（append reducer）、draft、critique、related_posts、final_response、langfuse_trace_id
pnpm astro check 無型別錯誤
stories.evidence: state.ts created with StateAnnotation.Root containing all required fields. Astro check exit 0.

stories.title: Research Tools
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/rag/tools/search-posts.ts 存在，export searchBlogPosts，查 Vectorize + D1 FTS5，回傳 SearchResult[]
src/lib/rag/tools/search-docs.ts 存在，export searchDocs
src/lib/rag/tools/get-post-detail.ts 存在，export getPostDetail，從 D1 by slug 取全文
pnpm astro check 無型別錯誤
stories.evidence: search-posts.ts, search-docs.ts, get-post-detail.ts all created as LangChain tools. Astro check exit 0.

stories.title: normalize_results Node（TDD）
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/rag/agents/normalize-results.ts 存在，export normalizeResultsNode
src/lib/rag/agents/normalize-results.test.ts 存在，JSON parse、position ordering、relevance scoring tests
pnpm test 全部通過
stories.evidence: normalize-results.ts + test created. 5 tests pass. pnpm test: 24 passed.

stories.title: Planner、Writer、Critic、Research、Related Posts Agents
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/rag/agents/planner.ts 存在，export plannerNode
src/lib/rag/agents/research.ts 存在，export researchNode
src/lib/rag/agents/writer.ts 存在，export writerNode
src/lib/rag/agents/critic.ts 存在，export criticNode 和 shouldRetry
src/lib/rag/agents/related-posts.ts 存在，export relatedPostsNode
src/lib/rag/agents/critic.test.ts 存在，shouldRetry routing tests 通過
pnpm test 全部通過
stories.evidence: All 5 agent files created. shouldRetry extracted to critic-routing.ts (pure). 4 critic routing tests pass. pnpm test: 24 passed.

stories.title: Graph Builder
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/rag/graph.ts 存在，export buildGraph
graph 節點順序：planner → research → normalizeResults → writer → critic（條件邊）→ relatedPosts
src/lib/rag/graph.test.ts 存在，smoke test graph compiles 通過
pnpm test 全部通過
stories.evidence: graph.ts created. Node renamed 'related_posts' → 'related' to avoid state channel conflict. graph.test.ts compiles without throwing. pnpm test: 24 passed.

stories.title: Chat SSE API Endpoint
acceptanceCriteria: src/pages/api/chat.ts 存在，POST handler
訪客 IP rate limit 5 次/日，超限回傳 429
admin session 無 rate limit
SSE Content-Type text/event-stream 串流輸出
對話寫入 chat_logs 表
pnpm astro check 無型別錯誤
stories.evidence: chat.ts POST handler with rate limiting (429), admin bypass, SSE streaming, chat_logs INSERT, Langfuse tracing. Astro check exit 0.

stories.title: Chat UI（React Island）
acceptanceCriteria: src/components/Chat/AgentSteps.tsx、QuotaIndicator.tsx、MessageInput.tsx、MessageList.tsx、ChatWidget.tsx 全部存在
src/pages/chat.astro 存在，import ChatWidget island，需 session 或 redirect /login
pnpm astro check 無 TS 錯誤
stories.evidence: All 5 Chat components created. chat.astro with ChatWidget client:load + session check. Astro check exit 0.

stories.title: Build 驗證 + 全部測試通過
acceptanceCriteria: pnpm test 全部通過，無 FAIL
pnpm lint 無錯誤
pnpm astro check 無 TS 錯誤
pnpm build 成功完成
stories.evidence: pnpm test: 24 passed. pnpm lint: clean. pnpm astro check: exit 0. pnpm build: exit 0.
